_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Files view — per-item git changes explorer with step drilldown and PDF export

steps.description: Alembic migration adding work_items.diff_text/diff_summary/merge_commit_sha and step_runs.diff_text/diff_summary; update WorkItem and StepRun ORM models in orch/db/models.py
Review S01 schema migration + ORM model updates for correctness, reversibility, NULL-safety, and column comments

Create orch/diff_service.py (resolver + unidiff parser); extend iw step-done to capture per-step diff into step_runs.diff_text/diff_summary; add post-squash hook in orch/daemon/merge_queue.py to capture aggregate diff into work_items.diff_text/diff_summary/merge_commit_sha; add unidiff dependency to pyproject.toml

Review S03: diff resolver routing, best-effort capture invariants (never blocks step-done or merge), append-only safety on step_runs, daemon_events warning emission on capture failure, generated-file glob list as single source of truth

Add new routes in dashboard/routers/items.py: GET /tab/files, GET /files/diff?step=, GET /files/untracked, GET /files/export.pdf?step=; remove the old /tab/artifacts route and prune _list_artifact_tree if no other caller; preserve /artifact-raw endpoint for the new untracked sub-panel

Create dashboard/templates/fragments/item_files.html (tab shell), item_files_untracked.html (untracked files panel), components/libs/diff2html.html (vendored diff2html-ui includes from dashboard/static/vendor/diff2html/, no CDN); update dashboard/templates/pages/project/item_detail.html to swap Artifacts → Files tab button; add dashboard/static/files.js for tree expand/collapse, filter, client-side per-file collapse toggle, dark-mode color-scheme sync; delete dashboard/templates/fragments/item_artifacts.html; append plain CSS rules to dashboard/static/styles.css if Tailwind classes alone don't suffice

Create dashboard/templates/exports/diff_pdf.html — branded WeasyPrint Jinja template that consumes parsed diff_summary + per-file Pygments-highlighted hunks, renders header + summary table + per-file unified diffs in IW palette; reuse the WeasyPrint setup pattern from dashboard/routers/docs.py:169

Review S05 + S06 + S07 holistically: route contract consistency (text/plain raw diff vs JSON envelope), fragment ↔ files.js wiring, dark-mode sync correctness, PDF template integrity, removed-route handling, accessibility (status by both color and letter)

Unit tests for diff resolver (live + DB + archived paths); integration tests for capture hooks (step-done + merge_queue) using PostgreSQL testcontainer; integration tests for new routes via FastAPI TestClient including /files/export.pdf returning application/pdf; browser-smoke test via playwright-cli for tab interaction (tree click, step toggle, untracked panel expand, PDF download)
Review S09 tests for coverage of AC1–AC8 and every Boundary Behavior row; confirm testcontainer URL replacement (psycopg2 → psycopg) and FTS DDL execution after create_all per tests/CLAUDE.md

Cross-step global review S01..S09 — verify migration → ORM → diff_service → step-done capture → merge_queue capture → routes → fragments → JS → PDF chain holds end-to-end; confirm all AC and Invariants are satisfied
QV: Linting
QV: Formatting
QV: Type checking
QV: Security SAST
QV: Unit tests
QV: Frontend tests
QV: Integration tests

QV: Browser verification — Files tab renders for an item; tree, status badges and +N −M bars visible; step toggle filters diff cards; untracked sub-panel expands and previews; Export PDF triggers download; no console errors and no regression in adjacent tabs (Overview, Reports, Evidences, Logs)
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
